steps.title: Spot the defining explanation
steps.content: Excavation involves weeks or even months of hard, physically tiring work, according to the passage. This extended, effortful nature is the key signal for what word describes the process.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: A process requiring weeks or months and hard labor is fundamentally difficult—effort and extended time make it challenging. The other choices address cost, frequency, or speed, none of which the passage emphasizes. That matches choice D — D is correct.
